elements.description: ห้องน้ำ 3, floor level box '3 +3.65 2' matching the plan view
Shower head (SW.) mounted on the left wall with hand-shower hose, soap dish (SP.) beside it -- integrated into the open room rather than a separately-leveled zone
WC.1-type toilet fixture shown in elevation, center of section
granite/tiled counter with mirror (M.) and LAV.1 basin, right side of section, height dims 1.00/2.00/0.20/0.20/0.60 on the right edge
A stepped floor-level profile is drawn at the base of the section, consistent with the +3.65 room level relative to the adjoining corridor

warnings: Second of 2 views on this page; sibling is the plan view _view1_wc3_plan.json.
This section confirms the plan view's finding that WC.3's shower is integrated into the single open room (no separate lower-level zone), unlike WC.2's distinct อาบน้ำ sub-zone (หน้า18).
This is the last of the 3 dedicated bathroom sheets (A-15/A-16/A-17) in this house's architecture set.
